summary: Voucher validation bug fix verification completed. Backend API tests all passed (8/8). The voucher validation endpoint is working correctly - returning proper error messages with 'detail' field for various scenarios (invalid code, expired, minimum purchase not met). Frontend error handling in POSPage.js and App.js is correctly extracting error messages from the API response.

integration_issues.issue: Test vouchers (TEST10OFF, MIN500) only exist in 'default' tenant. Admin user's tenant has different vouchers. This is expected multi-tenant behavior, not a bug.

features_tested.feature: Voucher Validation API - Valid voucher (no minimum)
details: API correctly handles case-insensitive code matching

features_tested.feature: Voucher Validation API - Valid voucher (with minimum met)
Voucher Validation API - Minimum purchase not met
details: Error message properly formatted with amount

features_tested.feature: Voucher Validation API - Invalid voucher code

details: App.js api() function extracts 'detail' from error response
POSPage.js applyVoucher() maps error messages to user-friendly versions
Frontend PermissionContext denies POS access when permissions not set
This is a separate issue from the voucher bug

action_items: NONE - Voucher validation fix is working correctly
OPTIONAL: Set proper staff permissions on test@example.com user for future testing
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend validate_voucher endpoint returns proper 'detail' field in error responses
GOOD: Frontend App.js api() wrapper extracts error.detail correctly (line 169-170)
GOOD: POSPage.js applyVoucher() maps common errors to user-friendly messages
GOOD: Voucher codes are case-insensitive (code.upper() in backend)
GOOD: Multi-tenant isolation working - vouchers scoped to tenant_id

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Could not fully test UI due to permission issue with test user

test_user.note: Has TEST10OFF, MIN500 vouchers but missing POS permissions

admin_user.note: Has POS access but different vouchers (SAVE100, SAVE250, etc.)

seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test vouchers created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voucher validation API is working correctly. Backend returns proper error messages. Frontend error handling improved in App.js and POSPage.js. Test vouchers (TEST10OFF, MIN500) exist in 'default' tenant. Admin tenant has different vouchers. The test@example.com user has staff role but null permissions - needs permissions set to access POS page.
